android.widget.TextView.text: Trump tells Republicans the SAVE America Act will ‘guarantee the midterms’
android.widget.TextView.heading: false

android.widget.TextView.text: President Trump on Monday pushed for the passage of a GOP voting requirements bill, telling House Republicans that enacting the legislation will “guarantee the midterms” and reiterating that he won’t sign any other bills until it gets passed.
android.widget.TextView.heading: false

android.widget.TextView.text: Articles: Get the full story by comparing reporting from different sources. Tap on the pills below to discover different perspectives using our sort & filters.
android.widget.TextView.heading: false
